About Us

Your Trusted Partner in Water Solutions & solar Specialist

Rachtech Irrigation Pvt Ltd is a leading provider of professional borehole drilling, irrigation equipment supply, and water management solutions. Based in Bulawayo, Zimbabwe, we serve residential, commercial, and agricultural clients with dedication and expertise.

With years of experience in the industry, our team of skilled technicians and engineers are committed to delivering reliable, sustainable water solutions that help our clients achieve their goals—whether it's ensuring clean water access for homes or maximizing crop yields for farms.

10+

Years

Experience

100+

Projects

Completed

50+

Happy

Clients

Our Mission

To advance modern agriculture through innovative irrigation and integrated water-management solutions that enhance efficiency, reliability, and sustainability.

Our Vision

To be the preferred choice for water and energy solutions, recognized for our expertise,innovation, and commitment to a sustainable future.

Quality First

We use only premium equipment and employ skilled technicians to ensure lasting results for every project.

Customer Focus

Your satisfaction is our priority. We work closely with clients to deliver solutions that exceed expectations.

Our Services

Complete Water & Irrigation Solutions

From borehole drilling to irrigation installation, we provide end-to-end water solutions for homes, farms, and businesses.

Borehole Drilling

Professional borehole drilling services using modern equipment. We handle site assessment, drilling, casing installation, and pump fitting for optimal water access.

  • Site Survey
  • Deep Drilling
  • Casing Installation
  • Pump Fitting
Learn More

Irrigation System Supply & Installation

Complete irrigation solutions including drip systems, sprinklers, and center pivots. We design and install systems tailored to your farm's needs.

  • Drip Irrigation
  • Sprinkler Systems
  • Center Pivots
  • Micro Jets
Learn More

Water Pumps & Accessories

Quality submersible pumps, surface pumps, and solar-powered systems. We supply, install, and maintain pumping equipment for all applications.

  • Submersible Pumps
  • Solar Pumps
  • Booster Pumps
  • Accessories
Learn More

Borehole Testing & Maintenance

Regular maintenance and testing services to ensure your borehole operates efficiently. We provide water quality testing and pump servicing.

  • Yield Testing
  • Water Quality
  • Pump Service
  • Rehabilitation
Learn More

Agricultural Water Solutions

Comprehensive water management for farms including dam construction, pipeline installation, and smart irrigation systems for maximum productivity.

  • Farm Planning
  • Pipeline Systems
  • Water Storage
  • Smart Controls
Learn More
Discuss Your Project
Why Choose Us

The Rachtech Advantage

When you choose Rachtech Irrigation, you're partnering with a team dedicated to excellence, reliability, and your complete satisfaction.

Experienced Technicians

Our team of skilled professionals brings years of expertise to every project, ensuring quality workmanship.

Quality Equipment

We use only premium, industry-standard equipment and materials for long-lasting, reliable installations.

Reliable After-Sales Support

Our commitment doesn't end at installation. We provide ongoing maintenance and support services.

Affordable Pricing

Competitive rates without compromising on quality. We offer flexible payment options for your convenience.

Timely Project Delivery

We respect your time and deliver projects on schedule, keeping you informed throughout the process.

Guaranteed Results

We stand behind our work with warranties and guarantees, giving you peace of mind with every project.
